description: Style Note Inspired by the Spin bowling during the 1996 World Cup, spinz came into being. You can embody a wining spirit with this range of long lasting perfumed deodorants with their sporty fragrances. Product Details Spinz's Black Magic deo comes in an aerosol spray canister and has musky floral fresh fragrance Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying in eyes Size 150 ml
